subject: Made changes to disable mariadb-init readiness job if external data layer is used and integrate nbi with the external data layer (configuring mariadb URL).
commit_message:
Made changes to disable mariadb-init readiness job if external data layer is used and integrate nbi with the external data layer (configuring mariadb URL).

Signed-off-by: Ahmad Abedalqader <ahmadse2022@gmail.com>
Change-Id: Ie11520d0afea53bf692798df1011bc133d8c5ba5
Signed-off-by: Ahmad Abedalqader <ahmadse2022@gmail.com>
Issue-ID: OOM-1

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2897/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2897/ )

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 85 instead of 80 characters maximum.

Line in cause: Made changes to integrate nbi with the external data layer (configuring mariadb URL). ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2897/ )
